title: Staff Nurse (Hospital) - Entry Level
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Administer medications, provide injections, and dress wounds as part of the nursing care process.
    Offer compassionate and comprehensive care tailored to each patient’s needs.
  • Deliver high standards of care through the full nursing process: assessment, planning, implementation, and evaluation.
  • Educate patients and families on health conditions, treatment options, and preventive care to support long-term well-being.
  • Ensure adherence to professional nursing practices and collaborate effectively with the multidisciplinary healthcare team to deliver integrated, patient-centered, and cost-effective care.
  • Mentor and orient junior nurses, fostering a supportive environment that promotes optimal patient care and achievement of desired outcomes.
  • Assist Nurse Manager or Senior Staff Nurse in implementing and executing both clinical and administrative tasks related to ward operations.
  • Provide patient care in accordance with hospital policies, nursing standards, and ethical guidelines to ensure quality and safety.
  • Document and report on patient conditions, progress, and nursing interventions, contributing to effective care management and decision-making.
  • Undertake any other tasks or responsibilities as delegated by the Nursing Division to meet the hospital's evolving needs.


Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Nursing
  • SNB registered Staff Nurse


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
